name: Sootmark Brigade
specialty: A versatile team renowned for their ability to navigate the chaotic rifts, offering a unique blend of combat prowess and stealthy infiltration.

members.name: Eira Ironshield
members.note: Scarred from numerous encounters with otherworldly creatures, her steel-blue eyes are cold, yet her resilience is unparalleled.

members.name: Thoren Blacksmoke
members.note: His keen senses allow him to detect even the subtlest of rifts, often making him the first line of defense for the group.

visual: Clad in weathered leather and wielding an assortment of crude yet effective weapons, the Sootmark Brigade is easily recognized by their distinctive black soot-stained markings, symbolizing their expertise in navigating the rifts of the Undercity.
reputation_note: Whispers among the Undercity's denizens speak of a team that can get you in and out of the most dangerous places, though they are rumored to always demand a hefty price for their services.
